# أهل الأثر (Ahl al-Athar)

> أرشيف علمي للمتون والمنظومات والدروس وفوائد السلف — Islamic scholarly archive: classical Arabic texts, didactic poems, lessons, and scholarly benefits, fully vowelled and verified.

## About

أهل الأثر is an independent, non-commercial scholarly archive dedicated to preserving and presenting traditional Sunni Islamic scholarship. The site is maintained by a single individual and is entirely free to read — there is no subscription, no paid tier, no premium content, and no newsletter.

The archive focuses on:
- Classical Arabic texts (متون) with full tashkeel (vowelling) and verification
- Didactic poems (منظومات) with line numbering, commentary, and attribution
- Transcribed lesson series (دروس) with audio where available
- Scholarly notes and benefits (كُناشة / فوائد)
- Scholar biographies (تراجم)
- Scholarly articles (مقالات)
- Legal and creedal questions (مسائل)

All content is in Arabic. The site is RTL (right-to-left).

## Content updates

New content is added irregularly as it is prepared and verified — there is no fixed publication schedule. The site is a living archive rather than a blog; updates can range from one to several items per week. Publication dates are not prominently displayed; the homepage shows the most recently added items across all content types.

## Contributing / Guest submissions

This is a personal archive, not an open-contribution platform. There are no guest author slots. To suggest a text for inclusion, report a transcription error, or propose a correction, email: tashih@ahlalathar.com

## Sections

- [الكتب (Books)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/books): Classical Islamic texts — creeds, jurisprudence, hadith, grammar — with full tashkeel.
- [الشعر (Poems)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/poems): Didactic Arabic poems (منظومات) with verse numbering, commentary, and author attribution.
- [الدروس (Lessons)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/series): Transcribed lesson series explaining classical texts, with audio.
- [الموضوعات (Topics)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/subjects): Thematic index linking related content across the archive.
- [الأعلام (Scholars)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/people): Biographies of classical and contemporary scholars, with their works in the archive.
- [المقالات (Articles)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/articles): Curated scholarly articles.
- [المسائل (Questions)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/questions): Scholarly legal and creedal questions and answers.
- [كُناشة (Benefits)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/benefits): Short scholarly notes and benefits (فوائد) excerpted from the texts.
- [المعجم (Glossary)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/mujam): Arabic technical term glossary.
- [شبكة المعرفة (Knowledge Graph)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/graph): Visual map of relationships between scholars, texts, and topics.
- [المتون (Core texts)](https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/matn): Filtered view of memorisable texts only.

## Technical

- Static site (Astro SSG) deployed on Cloudflare Workers
- Full-text search powered by Pagefind (in-browser, no server)
- All content stored as Markdown with structured frontmatter
- Sitemap: https://athar-archive.ahmedsinkeat2002.workers.dev/sitemap.xml
- Contact: tashih@ahlalathar.com
